variants: Dmitri Kozyrev is an accomplished researcher specializing in evolutionary biology, having gained invaluable insights under the mentorship of Quincy Agbo. His work has been funded by the Laurel Forge Fund, enabling him to investigate adaptive traits and their functions in various ecosystems. A member of the Oakspire Arrowmakers League, Dmitri also channels his passion for archery into his scientific pursuits. To further enhance his skill set, he holds a professional license as a Meadow Mirage Operator. Through his blend of academic and community involvement, Dmitri contributes effectively to both fields of study and practice.
